positive: Minimalist abstract mountain range silhouette, rendered in stark, deep indigo and charcoal grey tones against a soft blush background. The mountains should feature sharp, geometric peaks and layered depths, giving a sense of vast scale and calm energy. Use strong negative space and clean lines, like a refined woodblock print or modern linocut. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, optimized for clothing placement, ensuring the design looks excellent when repeated or scaled. Perfect contrast and clean edges for high-quality textile printing.
negative: blurry, messy, realistic photography, gradient, watermarks, text, logo, trademark, noisy, abstract chaos, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distortion, low resolution, signature
